Question:
From NHANES data from the years 2009 to 2018, we will conduct a weighted logistic regression.
Include participants who said yes when asked they were told by doctors they had diabetes, 
Exclude participants with missing data on whether they were told they had diabetic retinopathy, lactate dehydrogenase (U/L).
Categorize lactate dehydrogenas (U/L) in quartiles(%) Q1: ≤25, Q2: >25 and ≤50, Q3: >50 and ≤75, Q4: >75. Adjust the analysis for gender, race/Hispanic origin, and age.
Outcome is retinopathy presence based on whether were told they had diabetic retinopathy.
Structured Question:
Analysis Type: weighted logistic regression

Dataset: NHANES

Period of Interest: 2009-2018

Inclusion Criteria:
- told by doctors they had diabetes = Yes

Exclusion Criteria:
- missing whether they were told they had diabetic retinopathy
- missing lactate dehydrogenase (U/L)

Covariates:
- gender
- race/Hispanic origin
- age
- lactate dehydrogenase (U/L) categorized into quartiles:
  Q1: ≤25
  Q2: >25 and ≤50
  Q3: >50 and ≤75
  Q4: >75

Predictor: None

Outcome:
- retinopathy presence = 1 if were told they had diabetic retinopathy = Yes; 0 otherwise

SQL:
-- STEP 1: Create temp_master_weight

-- TEMP TABLE FOR weight
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_master_weight;

CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_master_weight AS
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       (full_sample_2_year_mec_exam_weight * 2.0 / 10.0) AS survey_weight
FROM nhanes.demo_f
WHERE full_sample_2_year_mec_exam_weight IS NOT NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       (full_sample_2_year_mec_exam_weight * 2.0 / 10.0) AS survey_weight
FROM nhanes.demo_g
WHERE full_sample_2_year_mec_exam_weight IS NOT NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       (full_sample_2_year_mec_exam_weight * 2.0 / 10.0) AS survey_weight
FROM nhanes.demo_h
WHERE full_sample_2_year_mec_exam_weight IS NOT NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       (full_sample_2_year_mec_exam_weight * 2.0 / 10.0) AS survey_weight
FROM nhanes.demo_i
WHERE full_sample_2_year_mec_exam_weight IS NOT NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       (full_sample_2_year_mec_exam_weight * 2.0 / 10.0) AS survey_weight
FROM nhanes.demo_j
WHERE full_sample_2_year_mec_exam_weight IS NOT NULL;


-- STEP 2: Create temp_psu_stratum

-- TEMP TABLE FOR PSU and Stratum
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_psu_stratum;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_psu_stratum AS
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       masked_variance_pseudo_psu AS masked_variance_pseudo_psu,
       masked_variance_pseudo_stratum AS masked_variance_pseudo_stratum
FROM nhanes.demo_f
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       masked_variance_pseudo_psu AS masked_variance_pseudo_psu,
       masked_variance_pseudo_stratum AS masked_variance_pseudo_stratum
FROM nhanes.demo_g
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       masked_variance_pseudo_psu AS masked_variance_pseudo_psu,
       masked_variance_pseudo_stratum AS masked_variance_pseudo_stratum
FROM nhanes.demo_h
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       masked_variance_pseudo_psu AS masked_variance_pseudo_psu,
       masked_variance_pseudo_stratum AS masked_variance_pseudo_stratum
FROM nhanes.demo_i
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       masked_variance_pseudo_psu AS masked_variance_pseudo_psu,
       masked_variance_pseudo_stratum AS masked_variance_pseudo_stratum
FROM nhanes.demo_j;


-- STEP 3: Create final weight+design table
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS weight_design;
CREATE TABLE weight_design AS
SELECT 
    s.respondent_sequence_number,
    s.masked_variance_pseudo_psu,
    s.masked_variance_pseudo_stratum,
    w.survey_weight
FROM temp_psu_stratum s
INNER JOIN temp_master_weight w
  ON s.respondent_sequence_number = w.respondent_sequence_number;




-- TEMP TABLE FOR "told by doctors they had diabetes"
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_master_doctor_told_you_have_diabetes;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_master_doctor_told_you_have_diabetes AS
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "doctor_told_you_have_diabetes" AS "doctor_told_you_have_diabetes"
FROM nhanes.diq_g
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "doctor_told_you_have_diabetes" AS "doctor_told_you_have_diabetes"
FROM nhanes.diq_h
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "doctor_told_you_have_diabetes" AS "doctor_told_you_have_diabetes"
FROM nhanes.diq_f
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "doctor_told_you_have_diabetes" AS "doctor_told_you_have_diabetes"
FROM nhanes.diq_i
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "doctor_told_you_have_diabetes" AS "doctor_told_you_have_diabetes"
FROM nhanes.diq_j;
-- Add index for faster joins
CREATE INDEX idx_temp_master_doctor_told_you_have_diabetes ON temp_master_doctor_told_you_have_diabetes (respondent_sequence_number);

-- TEMP TABLE FOR "were told they had diabetic retinopathy", "were told they had diabetic retinopathy"
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_master_diabetes_affected_eyes_had_retinopathy;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_master_diabetes_affected_eyes_had_retinopathy AS
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "diabetes_affected_eyes_had_retinopathy" AS "diabetes_affected_eyes_had_retinopathy"
FROM nhanes.diq_g

FROM nhanes.diq_j;
-- Add index for faster joins
CREATE INDEX idx_temp_master_diabetes_affected_eyes_had_retinopathy ON temp_master_diabetes_affected_eyes_had_retinopathy (respondent_sequence_number);

-- TEMP TABLE FOR "lactate dehydrogenase (u/l)", "lactate dehydrogenase (u/l)", "lactate dehydrogenase (u/l)"
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_master_lactate_dehydrogenase_u_l;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_master_lactate_dehydrogenase_u_l AS
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "lactate_dehydrogenase_u_l" AS "lactate_dehydrogenase_u_l"
FROM nhanes.biopro_g
UNION ALL

FROM nhanes.biopro_h
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "lactate_dehydrogenase_u_l" AS "lactate_dehydrogenase_u_l"
FROM nhanes.biopro_f
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "lactate_dehydrogenase_u_l" AS "lactate_dehydrogenase_u_l"
FROM nhanes.biopro_i
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "lactate_dehydrogenase_u_l" AS "lactate_dehydrogenase_u_l"
FROM nhanes.biopro_j;
-- Add index for faster joins
CREATE INDEX idx_temp_master_lactate_dehydrogenase_u_l ON temp_master_lactate_dehydrogenase_u_l (respondent_sequence_number);

-- TEMP TABLE FOR "gender"
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_master_gender;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_master_gender AS
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "gender" AS "gender"
FROM nhanes.demo_g
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "gender" AS "gender"
FROM nhanes.demo_h
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "gender" AS "gender"
FROM nhanes.demo_f
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "gender" AS "gender"
FROM nhanes.demo_i
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "gender" AS "gender"
FROM nhanes.demo_j;
-- Add index for faster joins
CREATE INDEX idx_temp_master_gender ON temp_master_gender (respondent_sequence_number);

-- TEMP TABLE FOR "race/hispanic origin"
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_master_race_hispanic_origin;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_master_race_hispanic_origin AS
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "race_hispanic_origin" AS "race_hispanic_origin"
FROM nhanes.demo_g
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "race_hispanic_origin" AS "race_hispanic_origin"
FROM nhanes.demo_h
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "race_hispanic_origin" AS "race_hispanic_origin"
FROM nhanes.demo_f
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "race_hispanic_origin" AS "race_hispanic_origin"
FROM nhanes.demo_i
UNION ALL

-- Add index for faster joins

-- TEMP TABLE FOR "age"
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_master_age_in_years_at_screening;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_master_age_in_years_at_screening AS
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "age_in_years_at_screening" AS "age_in_years_at_screening"
FROM nhanes.demo_g
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "age_in_years_at_screening" AS "age_in_years_at_screening"
FROM nhanes.demo_h
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "age_in_years_at_screening" AS "age_in_years_at_screening"

UNION ALL

-- Add index for faster joins
CREATE INDEX idx_temp_master_age_in_years_at_screening ON temp_master_age_in_years_at_screening (respondent_sequence_number);

-- ALL UNIQUE PATIENT IDs
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_all_ids;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_all_ids AS
SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM temp_master_doctor_told_you_have_diabetes
UNION
SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM temp_master_diabetes_affected_eyes_had_retinopathy
UNION
SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM temp_master_lactate_dehydrogenase_u_l
UNION
SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM temp_master_gender
UNION
SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM temp_master_race_hispanic_origin
UNION
SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM temp_master_age_in_years_at_screening;

-- Add index to the main ID table for the final join
CREATE INDEX idx_temp_all_ids_respondent_sequence_number ON temp_all_ids (respondent_sequence_number);

-- FINAL MASTER TABLE
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS final_master_table;
CREATE TABLE final_master_table AS
SELECT
    a.respondent_sequence_number,
    t0."doctor_told_you_have_diabetes",
    t1."diabetes_affected_eyes_had_retinopathy",
    t2."lactate_dehydrogenase_u_l",
    t3."gender",
    t4."race_hispanic_origin",
    t5."age_in_years_at_screening"
FROM temp_all_ids a
LEFT JOIN temp_master_doctor_told_you_have_diabetes t0 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t0.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_diabetes_affected_eyes_had_retinopathy t1 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t1.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_lactate_dehydrogenase_u_l t2 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t2.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_gender t3 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t3.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_race_hispanic_origin t4 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t4.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_age_in_years_at_screening t5 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t5.respondent_sequence_number;

CREATE INDEX idx_final_master_respondent_sequence_number    
    ON final_master_table (respondent_sequence_number);


-- Clean up final_master_table
DELETE FROM final_master_table
WHERE respondent_sequence_number NOT IN (
    SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM weight_design
);


-- ========== STEP 1: Inclusion ==========

-- STEP 1.1: Include participants who said yes when asked they were told by doctors they had diabetes
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_inclusion_step1 AS
SELECT "respondent_sequence_number"
FROM final_master_table
WHERE "doctor_told_you_have_diabetes" = 'Yes';

-- ========== STEP 2: Exclusions ==========

-- STEP 2.1: Exclude participants with missing data on whether they were told they had diabetic retinopathy
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step1 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_inclusion_step1 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."diabetes_affected_eyes_had_retinopathy" IS NOT NULL;

-- STEP 2.2: Exclude participants with missing data on lactate dehydrogenase (U/L)
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step2 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step1 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."lactate_dehydrogenase_u_l" IS NOT NULL;

-- ========== STEP 3: Cohort ==========

-- The final temp table in the exclusion sequence becomes temp_cohort.
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_cohort AS
SELECT "respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step2;

-- ========== STEP 4: Variables ==========

-- 4.1 Gender
-- Extract gender for the cohort
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_gender AS
SELECT c."respondent_sequence_number",
       f."gender"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- 4.2 Race/Hispanic Origin
-- Extract race/hispanic origin for the cohort
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_race_hispanic_origin AS
SELECT c."respondent_sequence_number",
       f."race_hispanic_origin"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- 4.3 Age
-- Extract age for the cohort
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_age AS
SELECT c."respondent_sequence_number",
       f."age_in_years_at_screening" AS "age"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- 4.4 Lactate Dehydrogenase (U/L)
-- Extract raw lactate dehydrogenase (U/L) for the cohort
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_lactate_dehydrogenase_raw AS
SELECT c."respondent_sequence_number",
       f."lactate_dehydrogenase_u_l"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- Compute quartile cutoffs for lactate dehydrogenase (U/L) within cohort
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_lactate_dehydrogenase_cutoffs AS
SELECT
  PERCENTILE_CONT(0.25) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "lactate_dehydrogenase_u_l") AS q1,
  PERCENTILE_CONT(0.50) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "lactate_dehydrogenase_u_l") AS q2,
  PERCENTILE_CONT(0.75) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "lactate_dehydrogenase_u_l") AS q3
FROM temp_lactate_dehydrogenase_raw;

-- Assign lactate dehydrogenase (U/L) quartile group
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_lactate_dehydrogenase_quartiles AS
SELECT l."respondent_sequence_number",
  CASE
    WHEN l."lactate_dehydrogenase_u_l" IS NULL THEN NULL
    WHEN l."lactate_dehydrogenase_u_l" <= (SELECT q1 FROM temp_lactate_dehydrogenase_cutoffs) THEN 'Q1: ≤25'
    WHEN l."lactate_dehydrogenase_u_l" <= (SELECT q2 FROM temp_lactate_dehydrogenase_cutoffs) THEN 'Q2: >25 and ≤50'
    WHEN l."lactate_dehydrogenase_u_l" <= (SELECT q3 FROM temp_lactate_dehydrogenase_cutoffs) THEN 'Q3: >50 and ≤75'
    ELSE 'Q4: >75'
  END AS "lactate_dehydrogenase_u_l"
FROM temp_lactate_dehydrogenase_raw l;

-- 4.5 Retinopathy Presence
-- Map 'diabetes_affected_eyes_had_retinopathy' to 1 for 'Yes' and 0 for 'No'
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_retinopathy_presence AS
SELECT c."respondent_sequence_number",
  CASE f."diabetes_affected_eyes_had_retinopathy"
    WHEN 'Yes' THEN 1
    WHEN 'No' THEN 0
    ELSE NULL
  END AS "retinopathy_presence"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- ========== STEP 5: Final Table ==========
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_final_table AS
SELECT
  c."respondent_sequence_number",
  g."gender",
  r."race_hispanic_origin",
  a."age",
  ldh."lactate_dehydrogenase_u_l",
  rp."retinopathy_presence"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN temp_gender g ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = g."respondent_sequence_number"
JOIN temp_race_hispanic_origin r ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = r."respondent_sequence_number"
JOIN temp_age a ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = a."respondent_sequence_number"
JOIN temp_lactate_dehydrogenase_quartiles ldh ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = ldh."respondent_sequence_number"
JOIN temp_retinopathy_presence rp ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = rp."respondent_sequence_number";

-- ========== STEP 6: Final Output ==========
SELECT * FROM temp_final_table;

-- STEP: Create merged final table with design variables + in_analysis flag
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_final_with_weights;

CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_final_with_weights AS
SELECT 
    wd."respondent_sequence_number",
    wd."masked_variance_pseudo_psu",
    wd."masked_variance_pseudo_stratum",
    wd."survey_weight",
    CASE WHEN ft."respondent_sequence_number" IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS "in_analysis",
    ft."gender",
    ft."race_hispanic_origin",
    ft."age",
    ft."lactate_dehydrogenase_u_l",
    ft."retinopathy_presence"
FROM weight_design wd
LEFT JOIN temp_final_table ft
  ON wd."respondent_sequence_number" = ft."respondent_sequence_number";
  
-- Preview the result
SELECT * FROM temp_final_with_weights;

suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(dplyr))
    suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(broom))
    suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(tibble))

    identifier_vars <- c("respondent_sequence_number")
    outcome_vars <- c("retinopathy_presence")
    weight_vars <- c("survey_weight","masked_variance_pseudo_psu","masked_variance_pseudo_stratum","in_analysis")

    cohort <- df[df$in_analysis == 1, names(df) != "in_analysis"]


    outcome_roles <- c()
    outcome_roles["retinopathy_presence"] <- "outcome"


    summarize_variable <- function(column, name) {
    n_unique <- length(unique(na.omit(column)))
    na_count <- sum(is.na(column))

    if (name %in% identifier_vars) {
        category <- "identifier"
        summary_info <- paste0("Total rows = ", nrow(cohort))

    } else if (name %in% outcome_vars) {
        # Assign its special role (e.g., "outcome", "mediator")
        category <- ifelse(!is.na(outcome_roles[name]), outcome_roles[name], "outcome")

        # Generate a summary based on its underlying data type
        underlying_type <- case_when(
        n_unique == 2                                 ~ "binary",
        is.numeric(column) & n_unique > 2             ~ "numerical",
        is.character(column) | is.factor(column)      ~ "categorical",
        TRUE                                          ~ "other"
        )

        if (underlying_type == "numerical") {
        mean_val <- round(mean(column, na.rm = TRUE), 3)
        sd_val   <- round(sd(column, na.rm = TRUE), 3)
        summary_info <- paste0("mean = ", mean_val, ", sd = ", sd_val)
        } else if (underlying_type %in% c("categorical", "binary")) {
        tbl <- prop.table(table(column)) * 100
        tbl <- round(tbl, 1)
        summary_info <- paste0(names(tbl), ": ", tbl, "%", collapse = "; ")
        } else {
        summary_info <- NA
        }

    

    } else if (name %in% weight_vars) {
        category <- "weight"
        summary_info <- "Weight variable" 
    

    } else {
        # This block handles regular predictors
        category <- case_when(
        n_unique == 2                                 ~ "binary",
        is.numeric(column) & n_unique > 2             ~ "numerical",
        is.character(column) | is.factor(column)      ~ "categorical",
        TRUE                                          ~ "other"
        )

        if (category == "numerical") {
        mean_val <- round(mean(column, na.rm = TRUE), 3)
        sd_val   <- round(sd(column, na.rm = TRUE), 3)
        summary_info <- paste0("mean = ", mean_val, ", sd = ", sd_val)
        } else if (category %in% c("categorical", "binary")) {
        tbl <- prop.table(table(column)) * 100
        tbl <- round(tbl, 1)
        summary_info <- paste0(names(tbl), ": ", tbl, "%", collapse = "; ")
        } else {
        summary_info <- NA
        }
    }

    data.frame(
        variable   = name,
        category   = category,
        n_unique   = n_unique,
        na_count   = na_count,
        summary    = summary_info,
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
    }

    report <- bind_rows(
    lapply(names(cohort), function(col_name) {
        summarize_variable(cohort[[col_name]], col_name)
    })
    )

    identifier_vars  <- report$variable[report$category == "identifier"]
    cat("Identifier Variables:\n");   print(identifier_vars);   cat("\n")

    weight_vars <- report$variable[report$category == "weight"]; cat("Weight Variables: "); print(weight_vars); psu_var <- weight_vars[grepl("psu", weight_vars, ignore.case = TRUE)][1]; cat("PSU:", psu_var); stratum_var <- weight_vars[grepl("stratum", weight_vars, ignore.case = TRUE)][1]; cat("Stratum:", stratum_var); weight_var <- weight_vars[grepl("weight", weight_vars, ignore.case = TRUE)][1]; cat("Weight:", weight_var); in_analysis_var <- weight_vars[grepl("in_analysis", weight_vars, ignore.case = TRUE)][1]; cat("In Analysis:", in_analysis_var)

    binary_vars      <- report$variable[report$category == "binary"]
    cat("Binary Variables:\n");       print(binary_vars);       cat("\n")
    print(binary_vars)

    categorical_vars <- report$variable[report$category == "categorical"]
    cat("Categorical Variables:\n");  print(categorical_vars);  cat("\n")
    print(categorical_vars)

    numerical_vars   <- report$variable[report$category == "numerical"]
    cat("Numerical Variables:\n");    print(numerical_vars);    cat("\n")
    print(numerical_vars)

    
    

    outcome_var     <- report$variable[report$category %in% c("outcome")]
    cat("Outcome Variables:\n");      print(outcome_var);      cat("\n")
    

    
    library(survey)
    options(survey.lonely.psu = "adjust")
        
    
    
    # Identify predictors and factor candidates
    predictor_vars <- report$variable[report$category %in% c("categorical", "binary", "numerical")]
    factor_candidates <- report$variable[report$category %in% c("categorical", "binary")]

    # Convert binary/categorical variables to factor if not already
    for (var in factor_candidates) {
    if (!is.factor(df[[var]])) {
        df[[var]] <- as.factor(df[[var]])
    }
    }

    # Initialize reference_levels table
    reference_levels <- tibble(variable = character(), reference_level = character())

    # Clean, trim, and set reference levels for all factor variables
    for (col in factor_candidates) {
    df[[col]] <- factor(trimws(as.character(df[[col]])))
    levels_vec <- levels(df[[col]])

    # Try to find preferred reference
    preferred_order <- c("healthy", "none", "control", "reference", "ref", "normal","Q1", "low", "0", "1")
    matches <- tolower(levels_vec)  # lower case to standardize
    ref_level <- NA  # default

    for (keyword in preferred_order) {
    idx <- which(grepl(keyword, matches, ignore.case = TRUE))
    if (length(idx) > 0) {
        ref_level <- levels_vec[idx[1]]  # pick the first match for that keyword
        break  # stop at the highest-priority match
    }
    }


    # If none found, fall back to most common level
    if (is.na(ref_level)) {
        level_counts <- table(df[[col]])
        ref_level <- names(level_counts)[which.max(level_counts)]
    }

    # Set reference level
    df[[col]] <- relevel(df[[col]], ref = ref_level)

    # Record reference level
    reference_levels <- bind_rows(
        reference_levels,
        tibble(variable = col, reference_level = ref_level)
    )
    }
    
        
    
    x_raw <- df[[outcome_var]]
    x_chr <- trimws(tolower(as.character(x_raw)))

    none_tokens <- c("none", "nan", "na", "", "null", "nil", "missing")
    x_chr[x_chr %in% none_tokens] <- NA_character_
    y <- rep(NA_integer_, length(x_chr))
    y[x_chr %in% c("yes", "y", "true", "t")]  <- 1L
    y[x_chr %in% c("no",  "n", "false", "f")] <- 0L
    x_num <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(x_chr))
    y[is.na(y) & !is.na(x_num) & x_num == 1] <- 1L
    y[is.na(y) & !is.na(x_num) & x_num == 0] <- 0L
    idx <- is.na(y) & !is.na(x_chr)
    if (any(idx)) {
    vals <- sort(unique(x_chr[idx]))
    if (length(vals) != 2) {
        stop(sprintf(
        "Outcome '%s' must have exactly 2 non-missing classes after excluding none. Found: %s",
        outcome_var, paste(vals, collapse = ", ")
        ))
    }
    tab <- table(x_chr[idx])
    minority <- names(tab)[which.min(tab)]
    majority <- setdiff(vals, minority)
    cat(sprintf(
        "Outcome '%s' recoding: 1 = %s (minority)  0 = %s (majority)",
        outcome_var, minority, majority
    ))
    y[idx] <- as.integer(x_chr[idx] == minority)
    }
    df[[outcome_var]] <- y
    u <- sort(unique(df[[outcome_var]][!is.na(df[[outcome_var]])]))
    if (!(length(u) == 2 && all(u == c(0, 1)))) {
    stop(sprintf(
        "After recoding, '%s' must contain both 0 and 1 (plus NA for none). Found: %s",
        outcome_var,
        ifelse(length(u) == 0, "<no non-missing values>", paste(u, collapse = ", "))
    ))
    }
    formula <- as.formula(paste0(outcome_var, " ~ ", paste(predictor_vars, collapse = " + ")))
            
    
    survey_design <- svydesign(
        ids     = as.formula(paste0("~", psu_var)),
        strata  = as.formula(paste0("~", stratum_var)),
        weights = as.formula(paste0("~", weight_var)),
        data    = df,
        nest    = TRUE
        )
    survey_design <- subset(survey_design, in_analysis ==1)
        
    
    model <- svyglm(formula,design = survey_design, family = quasibinomial()) 
            
    
    result_table <- tidy(model, conf.int = TRUE, exponentiate = TRUE) %>%
            select(term, estimate, p.value, conf.low, conf.high)

SQL:
-- STEP 1: Create temp_master_weight

-- TEMP TABLE FOR weight
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_master_weight;

CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_master_weight AS
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       (full_sample_2_year_mec_exam_weight * 2.0 / 10.0) AS survey_weight
FROM nhanes.demo_f
WHERE full_sample_2_year_mec_exam_weight IS NOT NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       (full_sample_2_year_mec_exam_weight * 2.0 / 10.0) AS survey_weight
FROM nhanes.demo_g
WHERE full_sample_2_year_mec_exam_weight IS NOT NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       (full_sample_2_year_mec_exam_weight * 2.0 / 10.0) AS survey_weight
FROM nhanes.demo_h
WHERE full_sample_2_year_mec_exam_weight IS NOT NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       (full_sample_2_year_mec_exam_weight * 2.0 / 10.0) AS survey_weight
FROM nhanes.demo_i
WHERE full_sample_2_year_mec_exam_weight IS NOT NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       (full_sample_2_year_mec_exam_weight * 2.0 / 10.0) AS survey_weight
FROM nhanes.demo_j
WHERE full_sample_2_year_mec_exam_weight IS NOT NULL;


-- STEP 2: Create temp_psu_stratum

-- TEMP TABLE FOR PSU and Stratum
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_psu_stratum;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_psu_stratum AS
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       masked_variance_pseudo_psu AS masked_variance_pseudo_psu,
       masked_variance_pseudo_stratum AS masked_variance_pseudo_stratum
FROM nhanes.demo_f
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       masked_variance_pseudo_psu AS masked_variance_pseudo_psu,
       masked_variance_pseudo_stratum AS masked_variance_pseudo_stratum
FROM nhanes.demo_g
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       masked_variance_pseudo_psu AS masked_variance_pseudo_psu,
       masked_variance_pseudo_stratum AS masked_variance_pseudo_stratum
FROM nhanes.demo_h
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       masked_variance_pseudo_psu AS masked_variance_pseudo_psu,
       masked_variance_pseudo_stratum AS masked_variance_pseudo_stratum
FROM nhanes.demo_i
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       masked_variance_pseudo_psu AS masked_variance_pseudo_psu,
       masked_variance_pseudo_stratum AS masked_variance_pseudo_stratum
FROM nhanes.demo_j;


-- STEP 3: Create final weight+design table
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS weight_design;
CREATE TABLE weight_design AS
SELECT 
    s.respondent_sequence_number,
    s.masked_variance_pseudo_psu,
    s.masked_variance_pseudo_stratum,
    w.survey_weight
FROM temp_psu_stratum s
INNER JOIN temp_master_weight w
  ON s.respondent_sequence_number = w.respondent_sequence_number;




-- TEMP TABLE FOR "told by doctors they had diabetes"
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_master_doctor_told_you_have_diabetes;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_master_doctor_told_you_have_diabetes AS
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "doctor_told_you_have_diabetes" AS "doctor_told_you_have_diabetes"
FROM nhanes.diq_g
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "doctor_told_you_have_diabetes" AS "doctor_told_you_have_diabetes"
FROM nhanes.diq_h
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "doctor_told_you_have_diabetes" AS "doctor_told_you_have_diabetes"
FROM nhanes.diq_f
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "doctor_told_you_have_diabetes" AS "doctor_told_you_have_diabetes"
FROM nhanes.diq_i
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "doctor_told_you_have_diabetes" AS "doctor_told_you_have_diabetes"
FROM nhanes.diq_j;
-- Add index for faster joins
CREATE INDEX idx_temp_master_doctor_told_you_have_diabetes ON temp_master_doctor_told_you_have_diabetes (respondent_sequence_number);

-- TEMP TABLE FOR "were told they had diabetic retinopathy", "were told they had diabetic retinopathy"
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_master_diabetes_affected_eyes_had_retinopathy;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_master_diabetes_affected_eyes_had_retinopathy AS
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "diabetes_affected_eyes_had_retinopathy" AS "diabetes_affected_eyes_had_retinopathy"
FROM nhanes.diq_g
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "diabetes_affected_eyes_had_retinopathy" AS "diabetes_affected_eyes_had_retinopathy"
FROM nhanes.diq_h
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "diabetes_affected_eyes_had_retinopathy" AS "diabetes_affected_eyes_had_retinopathy"
FROM nhanes.diq_f
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "diabetes_affected_eyes_had_retinopathy" AS "diabetes_affected_eyes_had_retinopathy"
FROM nhanes.diq_i
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "diabetes_affected_eyes_had_retinopathy" AS "diabetes_affected_eyes_had_retinopathy"
FROM nhanes.diq_j;
-- Add index for faster joins
CREATE INDEX idx_temp_master_diabetes_affected_eyes_had_retinopathy ON temp_master_diabetes_affected_eyes_had_retinopathy (respondent_sequence_number);

-- TEMP TABLE FOR "lactate dehydrogenase (u/l)", "lactate dehydrogenase (u/l)", "lactate dehydrogenase (u/l)"
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_master_lactate_dehydrogenase_u_l;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_master_lactate_dehydrogenase_u_l AS
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "lactate_dehydrogenase_u_l" AS "lactate_dehydrogenase_u_l"
FROM nhanes.biopro_g
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "lactate_dehydrogenase_u_l" AS "lactate_dehydrogenase_u_l"
FROM nhanes.biopro_h
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "lactate_dehydrogenase_u_l" AS "lactate_dehydrogenase_u_l"
FROM nhanes.biopro_f
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "lactate_dehydrogenase_u_l" AS "lactate_dehydrogenase_u_l"
FROM nhanes.biopro_i
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "lactate_dehydrogenase_u_l" AS "lactate_dehydrogenase_u_l"
FROM nhanes.biopro_j;
-- Add index for faster joins
CREATE INDEX idx_temp_master_lactate_dehydrogenase_u_l ON temp_master_lactate_dehydrogenase_u_l (respondent_sequence_number);

-- TEMP TABLE FOR "gender"
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_master_gender;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_master_gender AS
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "gender" AS "gender"
FROM nhanes.demo_g
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "gender" AS "gender"
FROM nhanes.demo_h
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "gender" AS "gender"
FROM nhanes.demo_f
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "gender" AS "gender"
FROM nhanes.demo_i
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "gender" AS "gender"
FROM nhanes.demo_j;
-- Add index for faster joins
CREATE INDEX idx_temp_master_gender ON temp_master_gender (respondent_sequence_number);

-- TEMP TABLE FOR "race/hispanic origin"
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_master_race_hispanic_origin;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_master_race_hispanic_origin AS
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "race_hispanic_origin" AS "race_hispanic_origin"
FROM nhanes.demo_g
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "race_hispanic_origin" AS "race_hispanic_origin"
FROM nhanes.demo_h
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "race_hispanic_origin" AS "race_hispanic_origin"
FROM nhanes.demo_f
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "race_hispanic_origin" AS "race_hispanic_origin"
FROM nhanes.demo_i
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "race_hispanic_origin" AS "race_hispanic_origin"
FROM nhanes.demo_j;
-- Add index for faster joins
CREATE INDEX idx_temp_master_race_hispanic_origin ON temp_master_race_hispanic_origin (respondent_sequence_number);

-- TEMP TABLE FOR "age"
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_master_age_in_years_at_screening;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_master_age_in_years_at_screening AS
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "age_in_years_at_screening" AS "age_in_years_at_screening"
FROM nhanes.demo_g
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "age_in_years_at_screening" AS "age_in_years_at_screening"
FROM nhanes.demo_h
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "age_in_years_at_screening" AS "age_in_years_at_screening"
FROM nhanes.demo_f
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "age_in_years_at_screening" AS "age_in_years_at_screening"
FROM nhanes.demo_i
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "age_in_years_at_screening" AS "age_in_years_at_screening"
FROM nhanes.demo_j;
-- Add index for faster joins
CREATE INDEX idx_temp_master_age_in_years_at_screening ON temp_master_age_in_years_at_screening (respondent_sequence_number);

-- ALL UNIQUE PATIENT IDs
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_all_ids;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_all_ids AS
SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM temp_master_doctor_told_you_have_diabetes
UNION
SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM temp_master_diabetes_affected_eyes_had_retinopathy
UNION
SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM temp_master_lactate_dehydrogenase_u_l
UNION
SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM temp_master_gender
UNION
SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM temp_master_race_hispanic_origin
UNION
SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM temp_master_age_in_years_at_screening;

-- Add index to the main ID table for the final join
CREATE INDEX idx_temp_all_ids_respondent_sequence_number ON temp_all_ids (respondent_sequence_number);

-- FINAL MASTER TABLE
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS final_master_table;
CREATE TABLE final_master_table AS
SELECT
    a.respondent_sequence_number,
    t0."doctor_told_you_have_diabetes",
    t1."diabetes_affected_eyes_had_retinopathy",
    t2."lactate_dehydrogenase_u_l",
    t3."gender",
    t4."race_hispanic_origin",
    t5."age_in_years_at_screening"
FROM temp_all_ids a
LEFT JOIN temp_master_doctor_told_you_have_diabetes t0 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t0.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_diabetes_affected_eyes_had_retinopathy t1 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t1.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_lactate_dehydrogenase_u_l t2 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t2.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_gender t3 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t3.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_race_hispanic_origin t4 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t4.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_age_in_years_at_screening t5 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t5.respondent_sequence_number;

CREATE INDEX idx_final_master_respondent_sequence_number    
    ON final_master_table (respondent_sequence_number);


-- Clean up final_master_table
DELETE FROM final_master_table
WHERE respondent_sequence_number NOT IN (
    SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM weight_design
);


-- ========== STEP 1: Inclusion ==========

-- STEP 1.1: Include participants who said yes when asked they were told by doctors they had diabetes
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_inclusion_step1 AS
SELECT "respondent_sequence_number"
FROM final_master_table
WHERE "doctor_told_you_have_diabetes" = 'Yes';

-- ========== STEP 2: Exclusions ==========

-- STEP 2.1: Exclude participants with missing data on whether they were told they had diabetic retinopathy
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step1 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_inclusion_step1 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."diabetes_affected_eyes_had_retinopathy" IS NOT NULL;

-- STEP 2.2: Exclude participants with missing data on lactate dehydrogenase (U/L)
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step2 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step1 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."lactate_dehydrogenase_u_l" IS NOT NULL;

-- ========== STEP 3: Cohort ==========

-- The final temp table in the exclusion sequence becomes temp_cohort.
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_cohort AS
SELECT "respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step2;

-- ========== STEP 4: Variables ==========

-- 4.1 Gender
-- Extract gender for the cohort
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_gender AS
SELECT c."respondent_sequence_number",
       f."gender"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- 4.2 Race/Hispanic Origin
-- Extract race/hispanic origin for the cohort
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_race_hispanic_origin AS
SELECT c."respondent_sequence_number",
       f."race_hispanic_origin"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- 4.3 Age
-- Extract age for the cohort
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_age AS
SELECT c."respondent_sequence_number",
       f."age_in_years_at_screening" AS "age"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- 4.4 Lactate Dehydrogenase (U/L)
-- Extract raw lactate dehydrogenase (U/L) values for the cohort
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_lactate_dehydrogenase_u_l_raw AS
SELECT c."respondent_sequence_number",
       f."lactate_dehydrogenase_u_l"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- Compute quartile cutoffs for lactate dehydrogenase (U/L) within cohort
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_lactate_dehydrogenase_u_l_cutoffs AS
SELECT
  PERCENTILE_CONT(0.25) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "lactate_dehydrogenase_u_l") AS q1,
  PERCENTILE_CONT(0.50) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "lactate_dehydrogenase_u_l") AS q2,
  PERCENTILE_CONT(0.75) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "lactate_dehydrogenase_u_l") AS q3
FROM temp_lactate_dehydrogenase_u_l_raw;

-- Assign lactate dehydrogenase (U/L) quartile group
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_lactate_dehydrogenase_u_l_quartiles AS
SELECT r."respondent_sequence_number",
  CASE
    WHEN r."lactate_dehydrogenase_u_l" IS NULL THEN NULL
    WHEN r."lactate_dehydrogenase_u_l" <= (SELECT q1 FROM temp_lactate_dehydrogenase_u_l_cutoffs) THEN 'Q1: ≤25%'
    WHEN r."lactate_dehydrogenase_u_l" <= (SELECT q2 FROM temp_lactate_dehydrogenase_u_l_cutoffs) THEN 'Q2: >25% and ≤50%'
    WHEN r."lactate_dehydrogenase_u_l" <= (SELECT q3 FROM temp_lactate_dehydrogenase_u_l_cutoffs) THEN 'Q3: >50% and ≤75%'
    ELSE 'Q4: >75%'
  END AS "lactate_dehydrogenase_u_l"
FROM temp_lactate_dehydrogenase_u_l_raw r;

-- 4.5 Retinopathy Presence
-- Map 'were told they had diabetic retinopathy' to 'retinopathy_presence' (1 or 0)
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_retinopathy_presence AS
SELECT c."respondent_sequence_number",
  CASE f."diabetes_affected_eyes_had_retinopathy"
    WHEN 'Yes' THEN '1'
    WHEN 'No' THEN '0'
    ELSE NULL
  END AS "retinopathy_presence"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- ========== STEP 5: Final Table ==========
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_final_table AS
SELECT
  c."respondent_sequence_number",
  tg."gender",
  tr."race_hispanic_origin",
  ta."age",
  tld."lactate_dehydrogenase_u_l",
  trp."retinopathy_presence"
FROM temp_cohort c
LEFT JOIN temp_gender tg ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = tg."respondent_sequence_number"
LEFT JOIN temp_race_hispanic_origin tr ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = tr."respondent_sequence_number"
LEFT JOIN temp_age ta ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = ta."respondent_sequence_number"
LEFT JOIN temp_lactate_dehydrogenase_u_l_quartiles tld ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = tld."respondent_sequence_number"
LEFT JOIN temp_retinopathy_presence trp ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = trp."respondent_sequence_number";

-- ========== STEP 6: Final Output ==========
SELECT * FROM temp_final_table;

-- STEP: Create merged final table with design variables + in_analysis flag
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_final_with_weights;

CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_final_with_weights AS
SELECT 
    wd."respondent_sequence_number",
    wd."masked_variance_pseudo_psu",
    wd."masked_variance_pseudo_stratum",
    wd."survey_weight",
    CASE WHEN ft."respondent_sequence_number" IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS "in_analysis",
    ft."gender",
    ft."race_hispanic_origin",
    ft."age",
    ft."lactate_dehydrogenase_u_l",
    ft."retinopathy_presence"
FROM weight_design wd
LEFT JOIN temp_final_table ft
  ON wd."respondent_sequence_number" = ft."respondent_sequence_number";
  
-- Preview the result

suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(dplyr))
    suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(broom))
    suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(tibble))

    identifier_vars <- c("respondent_sequence_number")
    outcome_vars <- c("retinopathy_presence")
    weight_vars <- c("survey_weight","masked_variance_pseudo_psu","masked_variance_pseudo_stratum","in_analysis")

    cohort <- df[df$in_analysis == 1, names(df) != "in_analysis"]


    outcome_roles <- c()
    outcome_roles["retinopathy_presence"] <- "outcome"


    summarize_variable <- function(column, name) {
    n_unique <- length(unique(na.omit(column)))
    na_count <- sum(is.na(column))

    if (name %in% identifier_vars) {
        category <- "identifier"
        summary_info <- paste0("Total rows = ", nrow(cohort))

    } else if (name %in% outcome_vars) {
        # Assign its special role (e.g., "outcome", "mediator")
        category <- ifelse(!is.na(outcome_roles[name]), outcome_roles[name], "outcome")

        # Generate a summary based on its underlying data type
        underlying_type <- case_when(
        n_unique == 2                                 ~ "binary",
        is.numeric(column) & n_unique > 2             ~ "numerical",
        is.character(column) | is.factor(column)      ~ "categorical",
        TRUE                                          ~ "other"
        )

        if (underlying_type == "numerical") {
        mean_val <- round(mean(column, na.rm = TRUE), 3)
        sd_val   <- round(sd(column, na.rm = TRUE), 3)
        summary_info <- paste0("mean = ", mean_val, ", sd = ", sd_val)
        } else if (underlying_type %in% c("categorical", "binary")) {
        tbl <- prop.table(table(column)) * 100
        tbl <- round(tbl, 1)
        summary_info <- paste0(names(tbl), ": ", tbl, "%", collapse = "; ")
        } else {
        summary_info <- NA
        }

    

    } else if (name %in% weight_vars) {
        category <- "weight"
        summary_info <- "Weight variable" 
    

    } else {
        # This block handles regular predictors
        category <- case_when(
        n_unique == 2                                 ~ "binary",
        is.numeric(column) & n_unique > 2             ~ "numerical",
        is.character(column) | is.factor(column)      ~ "categorical",
        TRUE                                          ~ "other"
        )

        if (category == "numerical") {
        mean_val <- round(mean(column, na.rm = TRUE), 3)
        sd_val   <- round(sd(column, na.rm = TRUE), 3)
        summary_info <- paste0("mean = ", mean_val, ", sd = ", sd_val)
        } else if (category %in% c("categorical", "binary")) {
        tbl <- prop.table(table(column)) * 100
        tbl <- round(tbl, 1)
        summary_info <- paste0(names(tbl), ": ", tbl, "%", collapse = "; ")
        } else {
        summary_info <- NA
        }
    }

    data.frame(
        variable   = name,
        category   = category,
        n_unique   = n_unique,
        na_count   = na_count,
        summary    = summary_info,
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
    }

    report <- bind_rows(
    lapply(names(cohort), function(col_name) {
        summarize_variable(cohort[[col_name]], col_name)
    })
    )

    identifier_vars  <- report$variable[report$category == "identifier"]
    cat("Identifier Variables:\n");   print(identifier_vars);   cat("\n")

    weight_vars <- report$variable[report$category == "weight"]; cat("Weight Variables: "); print(weight_vars); psu_var <- weight_vars[grepl("psu", weight_vars, ignore.case = TRUE)][1]; cat("PSU:", psu_var); stratum_var <- weight_vars[grepl("stratum", weight_vars, ignore.case = TRUE)][1]; cat("Stratum:", stratum_var); weight_var <- weight_vars[grepl("weight", weight_vars, ignore.case = TRUE)][1]; cat("Weight:", weight_var); in_analysis_var <- weight_vars[grepl("in_analysis", weight_vars, ignore.case = TRUE)][1]; cat("In Analysis:", in_analysis_var)

    binary_vars      <- report$variable[report$category == "binary"]
    cat("Binary Variables:\n");       print(binary_vars);       cat("\n")
    print(binary_vars)

    categorical_vars <- report$variable[report$category == "categorical"]
    cat("Categorical Variables:\n");  print(categorical_vars);  cat("\n")
    print(categorical_vars)

    numerical_vars   <- report$variable[report$category == "numerical"]
    cat("Numerical Variables:\n");    print(numerical_vars);    cat("\n")
    print(numerical_vars)

    
    

    outcome_var     <- report$variable[report$category %in% c("outcome")]
    cat("Outcome Variables:\n");      print(outcome_var);      cat("\n")
    

    
    library(survey)
    options(survey.lonely.psu = "adjust")
        
    
    
    # Identify predictors and factor candidates
    predictor_vars <- report$variable[report$category %in% c("categorical", "binary", "numerical")]
    factor_candidates <- report$variable[report$category %in% c("categorical", "binary")]

    # Convert binary/categorical variables to factor if not already
    for (var in factor_candidates) {
    if (!is.factor(df[[var]])) {
        df[[var]] <- as.factor(df[[var]])
    }
    }

    # Initialize reference_levels table
    reference_levels <- tibble(variable = character(), reference_level = character())

    # Clean, trim, and set reference levels for all factor variables
    for (col in factor_candidates) {
    df[[col]] <- factor(trimws(as.character(df[[col]])))
    levels_vec <- levels(df[[col]])

    # Try to find preferred reference
    preferred_order <- c("healthy", "none", "control", "reference", "ref", "normal","Q1", "low", "0", "1")
    matches <- tolower(levels_vec)  # lower case to standardize
    ref_level <- NA  # default

    for (keyword in preferred_order) {
    idx <- which(grepl(keyword, matches, ignore.case = TRUE))
    if (length(idx) > 0) {
        ref_level <- levels_vec[idx[1]]  # pick the first match for that keyword
        break  # stop at the highest-priority match
    }
    }


    # If none found, fall back to most common level
    if (is.na(ref_level)) {
        level_counts <- table(df[[col]])
        ref_level <- names(level_counts)[which.max(level_counts)]
    }

    # Set reference level
    df[[col]] <- relevel(df[[col]], ref = ref_level)

    # Record reference level
    reference_levels <- bind_rows(
        reference_levels,
        tibble(variable = col, reference_level = ref_level)
    )
    }
    
        
    
    x_raw <- df[[outcome_var]]
    x_chr <- trimws(tolower(as.character(x_raw)))

    none_tokens <- c("none", "nan", "na", "", "null", "nil", "missing")
    x_chr[x_chr %in% none_tokens] <- NA_character_
    y <- rep(NA_integer_, length(x_chr))
    y[x_chr %in% c("yes", "y", "true", "t")]  <- 1L
    y[x_chr %in% c("no",  "n", "false", "f")] <- 0L
    x_num <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(x_chr))
    y[is.na(y) & !is.na(x_num) & x_num == 1] <- 1L
    y[is.na(y) & !is.na(x_num) & x_num == 0] <- 0L
    idx <- is.na(y) & !is.na(x_chr)
    if (any(idx)) {
    vals <- sort(unique(x_chr[idx]))
    if (length(vals) != 2) {
        stop(sprintf(
        "Outcome '%s' must have exactly 2 non-missing classes after excluding none. Found: %s",
        outcome_var, paste(vals, collapse = ", ")
        ))
    }
    tab <- table(x_chr[idx])
    minority <- names(tab)[which.min(tab)]
    majority <- setdiff(vals, minority)
    cat(sprintf(
        "Outcome '%s' recoding: 1 = %s (minority)  0 = %s (majority)",
        outcome_var, minority, majority
    ))
    y[idx] <- as.integer(x_chr[idx] == minority)
    }
    df[[outcome_var]] <- y
    u <- sort(unique(df[[outcome_var]][!is.na(df[[outcome_var]])]))
    if (!(length(u) == 2 && all(u == c(0, 1)))) {
    stop(sprintf(
        "After recoding, '%s' must contain both 0 and 1 (plus NA for none). Found: %s",
        outcome_var,
        ifelse(length(u) == 0, "<no non-missing values>", paste(u, collapse = ", "))
    ))
    }
    formula <- as.formula(paste0(outcome_var, " ~ ", paste(predictor_vars, collapse = " + ")))
            
    
    survey_design <- svydesign(
        ids     = as.formula(paste0("~", psu_var)),
        strata  = as.formula(paste0("~", stratum_var)),
        weights = as.formula(paste0("~", weight_var)),
        data    = df,
        nest    = TRUE
        )
    survey_design <- subset(survey_design, in_analysis ==1)
        
    
    model <- svyglm(formula,design = survey_design, family = quasibinomial()) 
            
    
    result_table <- tidy(model, conf.int = TRUE, exponentiate = TRUE) %>%
            select(term, estimate, p.value, conf.low, conf.high)

-- STEP 1: Create temp_master_weight

-- TEMP TABLE FOR weight
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_master_weight;

CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_master_weight AS
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       (full_sample_2_year_mec_exam_weight * 2.0 / 10.0) AS survey_weight
FROM nhanes.demo_f
WHERE full_sample_2_year_mec_exam_weight IS NOT NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       (full_sample_2_year_mec_exam_weight * 2.0 / 10.0) AS survey_weight
FROM nhanes.demo_g
WHERE full_sample_2_year_mec_exam_weight IS NOT NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       (full_sample_2_year_mec_exam_weight * 2.0 / 10.0) AS survey_weight
FROM nhanes.demo_h
WHERE full_sample_2_year_mec_exam_weight IS NOT NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       (full_sample_2_year_mec_exam_weight * 2.0 / 10.0) AS survey_weight
FROM nhanes.demo_i
WHERE full_sample_2_year_mec_exam_weight IS NOT NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       (full_sample_2_year_mec_exam_weight * 2.0 / 10.0) AS survey_weight
FROM nhanes.demo_j
WHERE full_sample_2_year_mec_exam_weight IS NOT NULL;


-- STEP 2: Create temp_psu_stratum

-- TEMP TABLE FOR PSU and Stratum
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_psu_stratum;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_psu_stratum AS
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       masked_variance_pseudo_psu AS masked_variance_pseudo_psu,
       masked_variance_pseudo_stratum AS masked_variance_pseudo_stratum
FROM nhanes.demo_f
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       masked_variance_pseudo_psu AS masked_variance_pseudo_psu,
       masked_variance_pseudo_stratum AS masked_variance_pseudo_stratum
FROM nhanes.demo_g
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       masked_variance_pseudo_psu AS masked_variance_pseudo_psu,
       masked_variance_pseudo_stratum AS masked_variance_pseudo_stratum
FROM nhanes.demo_h
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       masked_variance_pseudo_psu AS masked_variance_pseudo_psu,
       masked_variance_pseudo_stratum AS masked_variance_pseudo_stratum
FROM nhanes.demo_i
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       masked_variance_pseudo_psu AS masked_variance_pseudo_psu,
       masked_variance_pseudo_stratum AS masked_variance_pseudo_stratum
FROM nhanes.demo_j;


-- STEP 3: Create final weight+design table
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS weight_design;
CREATE TABLE weight_design AS
SELECT 
    s.respondent_sequence_number,
    s.masked_variance_pseudo_psu,
    s.masked_variance_pseudo_stratum,
    w.survey_weight

UNION

-- FINAL MASTER TABLE
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS final_master_table;
CREATE TABLE final_master_table AS
SELECT
    a.respondent_sequence_number,
    t0."doctor_told_you_have_diabetes",
    t1."diabetes_affected_eyes_had_retinopathy",
    t2."lactate_dehydrogenase_u_l",
    t3."gender",
    t4."race_hispanic_origin",
    t5."age_in_years_at_screening"
FROM temp_all_ids a
LEFT JOIN temp_master_doctor_told_you_have_diabetes t0 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t0.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_diabetes_affected_eyes_had_retinopathy t1 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t1.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_lactate_dehydrogenase_u_l t2 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t2.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_gender t3 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t3.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_race_hispanic_origin t4 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t4.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_age_in_years_at_screening t5 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t5.respondent_sequence_number;

CREATE INDEX idx_final_master_respondent_sequence_number    
    ON final_master_table (respondent_sequence_number);


-- Clean up final_master_table
DELETE FROM final_master_table
WHERE respondent_sequence_number NOT IN (
    SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM weight_design
);


-- ========== STEP 1: Inclusion ==========

-- STEP 1.1: Includes participants who said yes when asked they were told by doctors they had diabetes
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_inclusion_step1 AS
SELECT "respondent_sequence_number"
FROM final_master_table
WHERE "doctor_told_you_have_diabetes" = 'Yes';

-- ========== STEP 2: Exclusions ==========

-- STEP 2.1: Exclude participants with missing data on whether they were told they had diabetic retinopathy
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step1 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_inclusion_step1 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."diabetes_affected_eyes_had_retinopathy" IS NOT NULL;

-- STEP 2.2: Exclude participants with missing data on lactate dehydrogenase (U/L)
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step2 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step1 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."lactate_dehydrogenase_u_l" IS NOT NULL;

-- ========== STEP 3: Final Cohort ==========

-- The final temp table in the exclusion sequence becomes temp_cohort.
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_cohort AS
SELECT "respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step2;

-- ========== STEP 4: Variables ==========

-- 4.1 Gender
-- Extract gender for the cohort
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_gender AS
SELECT c."respondent_sequence_number",
       f."gender"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- 4.2 Race/Hispanic origin
-- Extract race/hispanic origin for the cohort
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_race_hispanic_origin AS
SELECT c."respondent_sequence_number",
       f."race_hispanic_origin"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- 4.3 Age
-- Extract age for the cohort
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_age AS
SELECT c."respondent_sequence_number",
       f."age_in_years_at_screening" AS "age"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- 4.4 Lactate dehydrogenase (U/L)
-- Extract raw lactate dehydrogenase (U/L) values for the cohort
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_lactate_dehydrogenase_raw AS
SELECT c."respondent_sequence_number",
       f."lactate_dehydrogenase_u_l"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- Compute quartile cutoffs for lactate dehydrogenase (U/L) within the cohort
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_lactate_dehydrogenase_cutoffs AS
SELECT
  PERCENTILE_CONT(0.25) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "lactate_dehydrogenase_u_l") AS q1,
  PERCENTILE_CONT(0.50) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "lactate_dehydrogenase_u_l") AS q2,
  PERCENTILE_CONT(0.75) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "lactate_dehydrogenase_u_l") AS q3
FROM temp_lactate_dehydrogenase_raw;

-- Assign lactate dehydrogenase (U/L) quartile groups
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_lactate_dehydrogenase_quartiles AS
SELECT r."respondent_sequence_number",
  CASE
    WHEN r."lactate_dehydrogenase_u_l" IS NULL THEN NULL
    WHEN r."lactate_dehydrogenase_u_l" <= (SELECT q1 FROM temp_lactate_dehydrogenase_cutoffs) THEN 'Q1: ≤25%'
    WHEN r."lactate_dehydrogenase_u_l" > (SELECT q1 FROM temp_lactate_dehydrogenase_cutoffs) AND r."lactate_dehydrogenase_u_l" <= (SELECT q2 FROM temp_lactate_dehydrogenase_cutoffs) THEN 'Q2: >25% and ≤50%'
    WHEN r."lactate_dehydrogenase_u_l" > (SELECT q2 FROM temp_lactate_dehydrogenase_cutoffs) AND r."lactate_dehydrogenase_u_l" <= (SELECT q3 FROM temp_lactate_dehydrogenase_cutoffs) THEN 'Q3: >50% and ≤75%'
    ELSE 'Q4: >75%'
  END AS "lactate_dehydrogenase_u_l"
FROM temp_lactate_dehydrogenase_raw r;

-- 4.5 Retinopathy presence
-- Map 'were told they had diabetic retinopathy' to binary outcome
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_retinopathy_presence AS
SELECT c."respondent_sequence_number",
  CASE f."diabetes_affected_eyes_had_retinopathy"
    WHEN 'Yes' THEN '1'
    WHEN 'No' THEN '0'
    ELSE NULL
  END AS "retinopathy_presence"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- ========== STEP 5: Final Table ==========
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_final_table AS
SELECT
  c."respondent_sequence_number",
  g."gender",
  r."race_hispanic_origin",
  a."age",
  ldh."lactate_dehydrogenase_u_l",
  rp."retinopathy_presence"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN temp_gender g ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = g."respondent_sequence_number"
JOIN temp_race_hispanic_origin r ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = r."respondent_sequence_number"
JOIN temp_age a ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = a."respondent_sequence_number"
JOIN temp_lactate_dehydrogenase_quartiles ldh ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = ldh."respondent_sequence_number"
JOIN temp_retinopathy_presence rp ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = rp."respondent_sequence_number";

-- ========== STEP 6: Final Output ==========
SELECT * FROM temp_final_table;

-- STEP: Create merged final table with design variables + in_analysis flag
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_final_with_weights;

CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_final_with_weights AS
SELECT 
    wd."respondent_sequence_number",
    wd."masked_variance_pseudo_psu",
    wd."masked_variance_pseudo_stratum",
    wd."survey_weight",
    CASE WHEN ft."respondent_sequence_number" IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS "in_analysis",
    ft."gender",
    ft."race_hispanic_origin",
    ft."age",
    ft."lactate_dehydrogenase_u_l",
    ft."retinopathy_presence"
FROM weight_design wd
LEFT JOIN temp_final_table ft
  ON wd."respondent_sequence_number" = ft."respondent_sequence_number";
  
-- Preview the result

R:
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(dplyr))
    suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(broom))
    suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(tibble))

    identifier_vars <- c("respondent_sequence_number")
    outcome_vars <- c("retinopathy_presence")
    weight_vars <- c("survey_weight","masked_variance_pseudo_psu","masked_variance_pseudo_stratum","in_analysis")

    cohort <- df[df$in_analysis == 1, names(df) != "in_analysis"]


    outcome_roles <- c()
    outcome_roles["retinopathy_presence"] <- "outcome"


    summarize_variable <- function(column, name) {
    n_unique <- length(unique(na.omit(column)))
    na_count <- sum(is.na(column))

    if (name %in% identifier_vars) {
        category <- "identifier"
        summary_info <- paste0("Total rows = ", nrow(cohort))

    } else if (name %in% outcome_vars) {
        # Assign its special role (e.g., "outcome", "mediator")
        category <- ifelse(!is.na(outcome_roles[name]), outcome_roles[name], "outcome")

        # Generate a summary based on its underlying data type
        underlying_type <- case_when(
        n_unique == 2                                 ~ "binary",
        is.numeric(column) & n_unique > 2             ~ "numerical",
        is.character(column) | is.factor(column)      ~ "categorical",
        TRUE                                          ~ "other"
        )

        if (underlying_type == "numerical") {
        mean_val <- round(mean(column, na.rm = TRUE), 3)
        sd_val   <- round(sd(column, na.rm = TRUE), 3)
        summary_info <- paste0("mean = ", mean_val, ", sd = ", sd_val)
        } else if (underlying_type %in% c("categorical", "binary")) {
        tbl <- prop.table(table(column)) * 100
        tbl <- round(tbl, 1)
        summary_info <- paste0(names(tbl), ": ", tbl, "%", collapse = "; ")
        } else {
        summary_info <- NA
        }

    

    } else if (name %in% weight_vars) {
        category <- "weight"
        summary_info <- "Weight variable" 
    

    } else {
        # This block handles regular predictors
        category <- case_when(
        n_unique == 2                                 ~ "binary",
        is.numeric(column) & n_unique > 2             ~ "numerical",
        is.character(column) | is.factor(column)      ~ "categorical",
        TRUE                                          ~ "other"
        )

        if (category == "numerical") {
        mean_val <- round(mean(column, na.rm = TRUE), 3)
        sd_val   <- round(sd(column, na.rm = TRUE), 3)
        summary_info <- paste0("mean = ", mean_val, ", sd = ", sd_val)
        } else if (category %in% c("categorical", "binary")) {
        tbl <- prop.table(table(column)) * 100
        tbl <- round(tbl, 1)
        summary_info <- paste0(names(tbl), ": ", tbl, "%", collapse = "; ")
        } else {
        summary_info <- NA
        }
    }

    data.frame(
        variable   = name,
        category   = category,
        n_unique   = n_unique,
        na_count   = na_count,
        summary    = summary_info,
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
    }

    report <- bind_rows(
    lapply(names(cohort), function(col_name) {
        summarize_variable(cohort[[col_name]], col_name)
    })
    )

    identifier_vars  <- report$variable[report$category == "identifier"]
    cat("Identifier Variables:\n");   print(identifier_vars);   cat("\n")

    weight_vars <- report$variable[report$category == "weight"]; cat("Weight Variables: "); print(weight_vars); psu_var <- weight_vars[grepl("psu", weight_vars, ignore.case = TRUE)][1]; cat("PSU:", psu_var); stratum_var <- weight_vars[grepl("stratum", weight_vars, ignore.case = TRUE)][1]; cat("Stratum:", stratum_var); weight_var <- weight_vars[grepl("weight", weight_vars, ignore.case = TRUE)][1]; cat("Weight:", weight_var); in_analysis_var <- weight_vars[grepl("in_analysis", weight_vars, ignore.case = TRUE)][1]; cat("In Analysis:", in_analysis_var)

    binary_vars      <- report$variable[report$category == "binary"]
    cat("Binary Variables:\n");       print(binary_vars);       cat("\n")
    print(binary_vars)

    categorical_vars <- report$variable[report$category == "categorical"]
    cat("Categorical Variables:\n");  print(categorical_vars);  cat("\n")
    print(categorical_vars)

    numerical_vars   <- report$variable[report$category == "numerical"]
    cat("Numerical Variables:\n");    print(numerical_vars);    cat("\n")
    print(numerical_vars)

    
    

    outcome_var     <- report$variable[report$category %in% c("outcome")]
    cat("Outcome Variables:\n");      print(outcome_var);      cat("\n")
    

    
    library(survey)
    options(survey.lonely.psu = "adjust")
        
    
    
    # Identify predictors and factor candidates
    predictor_vars <- report$variable[report$category %in% c("categorical", "binary", "numerical")]
    factor_candidates <- report$variable[report$category %in% c("categorical", "binary")]

    # Convert binary/categorical variables to factor if not already
    for (var in factor_candidates) {
    if (!is.factor(df[[var]])) {
        df[[var]] <- as.factor(df[[var]])
    }
    }

    # Initialize reference_levels table
    reference_levels <- tibble(variable = character(), reference_level = character())

    # Clean, trim, and set reference levels for all factor variables
    for (col in factor_candidates) {
    df[[col]] <- factor(trimws(as.character(df[[col]])))
    levels_vec <- levels(df[[col]])

    # Try to find preferred reference
    preferred_order <- c("healthy", "none", "control", "reference", "ref", "normal","Q1", "low", "0", "1")
    matches <- tolower(levels_vec)  # lower case to standardize
    ref_level <- NA  # default

    for (keyword in preferred_order) {
    idx <- which(grepl(keyword, matches, ignore.case = TRUE))
    if (length(idx) > 0) {
        ref_level <- levels_vec[idx[1]]  # pick the first match for that keyword
        break  # stop at the highest-priority match
    }
    }


    # If none found, fall back to most common level
    if (is.na(ref_level)) {
        level_counts <- table(df[[col]])
        ref_level <- names(level_counts)[which.max(level_counts)]
    }

    # Set reference level
    df[[col]] <- relevel(df[[col]], ref = ref_level)

    # Record reference level
    reference_levels <- bind_rows(
        reference_levels,
        tibble(variable = col, reference_level = ref_level)
    )
    }
    
        
    
    x_raw <- df[[outcome_var]]
    x_chr <- trimws(tolower(as.character(x_raw)))

    none_tokens <- c("none", "nan", "na", "", "null", "nil", "missing")
    x_chr[x_chr %in% none_tokens] <- NA_character_
    y <- rep(NA_integer_, length(x_chr))
    y[x_chr %in% c("yes", "y", "true", "t")]  <- 1L
    y[x_chr %in% c("no",  "n", "false", "f")] <- 0L
    x_num <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(x_chr))
    y[is.na(y) & !is.na(x_num) & x_num == 1] <- 1L
    y[is.na(y) & !is.na(x_num) & x_num == 0] <- 0L
    idx <- is.na(y) & !is.na(x_chr)
    if (any(idx)) {
    vals <- sort(unique(x_chr[idx]))
    if (length(vals) != 2) {
        stop(sprintf(
        "Outcome '%s' must have exactly 2 non-missing classes after excluding none. Found: %s",
        outcome_var, paste(vals, collapse = ", ")
        ))
    }
    tab <- table(x_chr[idx])
    minority <- names(tab)[which.min(tab)]
    majority <- setdiff(vals, minority)
    cat(sprintf(
        "Outcome '%s' recoding: 1 = %s (minority)  0 = %s (majority)",
        outcome_var, minority, majority
    ))
    y[idx] <- as.integer(x_chr[idx] == minority)
    }
    df[[outcome_var]] <- y
    u <- sort(unique(df[[outcome_var]][!is.na(df[[outcome_var]])]))
    if (!(length(u) == 2 && all(u == c(0, 1)))) {
    stop(sprintf(
        "After recoding, '%s' must contain both 0 and 1 (plus NA for none). Found: %s",
        outcome_var,
        ifelse(length(u) == 0, "<no non-missing values>", paste(u, collapse = ", "))
    ))
    }
    formula <- as.formula(paste0(outcome_var, " ~ ", paste(predictor_vars, collapse = " + ")))
            
    
    survey_design <- svydesign(
        ids     = as.formula(paste0("~", psu_var)),
        strata  = as.formula(paste0("~", stratum_var)),
        weights = as.formula(paste0("~", weight_var)),
        data    = df,
        nest    = TRUE
        )
    survey_design <- subset(survey_design, in_analysis ==1)
        
    
    model <- svyglm(formula,design = survey_design, family = quasibinomial())
